title: OpenCosmos ISIM-90 Extension
description: STAC OpenCosmos ISIM-90 Extension for ISIM-90 payload processing metadata. Applied to items produced from the ISIM-90 payload.

oneOf.$comment: This is the schema for STAC Items.

opencosmos:session_id.title: Session ID
opencosmos:session_id.description: Unique identifier for the image acquisition session, generated by the payload.

opencosmos:isim90:start_frame.title: Start Frame
opencosmos:isim90:start_frame.description: Index of the first frame of the acquisition, as reported by the payload.

opencosmos:isim90:end_frame.title: End Frame
opencosmos:isim90:end_frame.description: Index of the last frame of the acquisition, as reported by the payload.
